draft.good: no '200'/'500' as bounds, no 'floor/ceiling/maximum/budget cap'; commission stated as 10% if mentioned

draft.subject: AeroSoft Partnership Offer
draft.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for your interest in collaborating with AeroSoft. We appreciate your request of $460 and are happy to share our offer.

- The fixed fee for this collaboration is $400.
- This is a hybrid partnership: a fixed fee for your content, plus a 10% commission on the sales you drive.
- Deliverables include 1 Instagram Reel + 3 Instagram Stories, with 30-day usage rights.

Timeline: Content live by October 10, 2026.

As part of this collaboration, you’ll also receive one pair of AeroSoft Cloudstride running shoes plus a branded sock set.

We’re excited to work with you and look forward to your confirmation or any additional questions you may have.

Best,
AeroSoft

draft.good: confirms the agreed $420 clearly; no bound leak; next steps

draft.subject: AeroSoft Partnership Offer
draft.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for your question! We’re excited to share the details of our partnership.

- The base fee for this collaboration is $380.
- This is a hybrid partnership: a fixed fee for your content, plus a 10% commission on the sales you drive.
- Deliverables include 1 Instagram Reel + 3 Instagram Stories, with 30-day usage rights.

Timeline: Content live by October 10, 2026.

As part of this collaboration, you’ll receive one pair of AeroSoft Cloudstride running shoes plus a branded sock set.

We’re happy to confirm that we’re offering 30-day usage rights, and there is no category exclusivity required. Payment is due net-30 after the content goes live, and the 30-day attribution window applies to the affiliate link.

Please let us know if you have any other questions or if you’d like to confirm the offer.

Best,
AeroSoft
